publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2023-01-12 23:01:24 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.abstract: Cornell related clippings from the Cornell Daily Sun, the Ithaca Journal, the Cornell Chronicle, and the Ithaca Times, organized by subject headings and including a card index.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Cornell related clippings from the Cornell Daily Sun, the Ithaca Journal, the Cornell Chronicle, and the Ithaca Times, organized by subject headings and including a card index.

odd.head: NOTES
odd.p: See also Cornell University News Service records, #4-3-15: http://resolver.library.cornell.edu/cgi-bin/EADresolver?id=RMA00015.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Cornell clippings file, #13-8-3367. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
